abort.all_devices_configured: All available input devices are already configured.
abort.cannot_identify_device: Could not identify the device from the YAML configuration. Ensure the device is connected and the configuration is correct.
abort.no_devices: No input devices found in /dev/input/by-id/. Ensure input devices are connected and accessible.

error.cannot_connect: Could not open the selected input device. Check permissions and that the device is connected.

data_description.device_path: Select the input device from the list of detected devices.

user.description: Choose an input device to use as a keyboard remote.
user.title: Select input device

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_iden.description:
Configuring Keyboard Remote using YAML is being removed but there was an error importing one of your device configurations: the device could not be identified.

To fix this issue:

1. Ensure the device is connected
2. Correct your YAML configuration
3. Restart Home Assistant to try the import again

Alternatively, remove the `keyboard_remote` key from your `configuration.yaml` and configure the integration via the [UI]({url}).
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_iden.title: Keyboard Remote YAML import failed

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_unknown.description:
Configuring Keyboard Remote using YAML is being removed but an unknown error occurred while importing your configuration.

To fix this issue:

1. Review and correct your YAML configuration
2. Restart Home Assistant to try the import again

Alternatively, remove the `keyboard_remote` key from your `configuration.yaml` and configure the integration via the [UI]({url}).
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_unknown.title: Keyboard Remote YAML import failed

data_description.emulate_key_hold: Enable software emulation of key hold events.
data_description.emulate_key_hold_delay: Delay in seconds before key hold emulation starts.
data_description.emulate_key_hold_repeat: Repeat interval in seconds for emulated key hold events.
data_description.key_types: Select which key events to listen for.
